recommendations.title: Steamboat Willie
recommendations.overview: Mickey Mouse, piloting a steamboat, delights his passenger, Minnie Mouse, by making musical instruments out of the menagerie on deck.

recommendations.title: Plane Crazy
recommendations.overview: Referred as the actual first Mickey Mouse short. Inspired by Lindbergh's flight from New York to Paris, Mickey builds a plane to take Minnie for a trip.

recommendations.title: The Golden Touch
recommendations.overview: King Midas is visited by an elf; the elf turns his cat to gold, then claps his hands and it changes back. Midas begs for the golden touch, but the elf warns him it would be a curse to him. Midas insists. He dances about joyfully at first, but discove

recommendations.title: The Aristocats
recommendations.overview: When Madame Adelaide Bonfamille leaves her fortune to Duchess and her children—Bonfamille’s beloved family of cats—the butler plots to steal the money and kidnaps the legatees, leaving them out on a country road. All seems lost until the wily Thomas

recommendations.title: Lonesome Ghosts
recommendations.overview: On a dark and stormy night, four bored ghosts decide to have some fun by calling the Ajax Ghost Exterminators.

recommendations.title: Santa's Workshop
recommendations.overview: Santa's little helpers must hurry to finish the toys before Christmas Day.

recommendations.title: Fantasia
recommendations.overview: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.
recommendations.director: Jim Handley, James Algar, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand, Paul Satterfield, Wilfred Jackson, Ford Beebe Jr., Hamilton Luske, T. Hee, Samuel Armstrong

recommendations.title: Flowers and Trees
recommendations.overview: A jealous stump threatens two trees that are in love by starting a forest fire. When the rain comes and puts out the fire the forest revives and celebrates the wedding.

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.

recommendations.title: Cinderella
recommendations.overview: Cinderella has faith her dreams of a better life will come true. With help from her loyal mice friends and a wave of her Fairy Godmother's wand, Cinderella's rags are magically turned into a glorious gown and off she goes to the Royal Ball. But when
recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson
